entry.title: Getting URL of an image uploaded in mime repository for HTML tag
entry.content:
I am using the FM SO_DOCUMENT_SEND_API1 to send an email with an excel file attachment.
I need the body of the email to contain an image that I have uploaded in mime repository in se80.

I have tried retrieving the URL of the image using FM 'WWW_GET_MIME_OBJECT' and 'DP_CREATE_URL'
and then entering the URL in html tag while populating the text body of the mail as shown below.
assuming that the URL received is "url_link"

<img src = "url_link" align = "right";width = 150>

This approach is not working. The FM 'WWW_GET_MIME_OBJECT' is failing.

However, if I replace the url_link with actual url from the internet of an image. The image is getting embedded as expected in the mail body.


How do I ensure that instead of getting the image from outside, I can get it internally once uploaded in SAP System?

entry.title: SAPUI5 app multitenant app - standalone approuter
entry.content:
Hi,

I am a bit confused around multitenancy for a pure sapui5 app deployed with a standalone approuter. There are a lot of information around introducing multitenancy to a CAP app, but cannot find how can i make a pure sapui5 app multitenant with options to susbcribe to the app and options to have different URL pointing to the approuter for each customer. Am i missing something in understanding how this works?

entry.title: How to integrate application in Micro frontend architecture with MTA
entry.content:
Hi,

I am creating Micro-frontend architecture for SAPUI5 applications. I am able to deploy each application to cloud foundry successfully. Now, I need to know, how to integrate the all the applications and communicate with each other. Can someone help me on this

entry.title: Expose HTML5 apps on SAP Workzone Standard/Advanced edition
entry.content:
Hi gurus,

reading the official documentation, it seems impossible to publish an HTML5 app from a different subaccount.

Is there any workaround? I have apps on different subaccounts and the Workzone instance is on another one. I thought it was a deployment restriction just for the standard edition but after reading the help documentation it is for the advanced edition too.

Thank you

Patrizia

entry.title: Format validation failed (Route references unknown destination \"userinfo\")"}
entry.content:
Hello,

I am getting this error on the SAP BTP approuter logs when opening my standalone app with on-premise destinations:

"msg":"GET request to /*** completed with status 500 xs-app.json/routes/0: Format validation failed (Route references unknown destination \"userinfo\")"}<br>

(/*** Would be the name of my app censored because privacy policies)

By the research I have made this seems to be a problem with how destinations are declared on the xs-app.json. The thing is that I have deployed this exact same app on another space from another SAP BTP Trial account and works fine, but when I deploy the exact same .mtar to the new Trial I get the error above. This makes my think it can be a missing BTP configuration, but I have deployed other apps to the same Trial account and with the same destination configuration on the xs-app and also works fine. So now I am a bit lost and dont know where to look.

Here is the xs-app.json from the app that is throwing the error:

{
  "welcomeFile": "/index.html",
  "authenticationMethod": "route",
  "routes": [
    {
      "source": "^/userinfo/(.*)$",
      "target": "$1",
      "authenticationType": "none",
      "destination": "userinfo",
      "csrfProtection": false
    },
    {
      "source": "^/sap/(.*)$",
      "target": "/sap/$1",
      "authenticationType": "none",
      "destination": "EHI",
      "csrfProtection": false
    },
    {
      "source": "^(.*)$",
      "target": "$1",
      "service": "html5-apps-repo-rt",
      "authenticationType": "xsuaa"
    }
  ]
}

Here is the xs-app.json from another app deployed on the same trial and working fine:

{
  "welcomeFile": "/index.html",
  "authenticationMethod": "route",
  "routes": [
    {
      "source": "^/***/(.*)$",
      "target": "$1",
      "authenticationType": "none",
      "destination": "***",
      "csrfProtection": false
    },
    {
      "source": "^/userinfo/(.*)$",
      "target": "$1",
      "authenticationType": "none",
      "destination": "userinfo",
      "csrfProtection": false
    },
    {
      "source": "^/***/(.*)$",
      "target": "$1",
      "authenticationType": "none",
      "destination": "*****",
      "csrfProtection": false
    },
    {
      "source": "^/***/(.*)$",
      "target": "$1",
      "authenticationType": "none",
      "destination": "GCI10",
      "csrfProtection": false
    },
    {
      "source": "^/sap/(.*)$",
      "target": "/sap/$1",
      "authenticationType": "none",
      "destination": "GCI10",
      "csrfProtection": false
    },
    {
      "source": "^(.*)$",
      "target": "$1",
      "service": "html5-apps-repo-rt",
      "authenticationType": "xsuaa"
    }
  ]
}

(*** Would be the censored names)

On the BTP side, all the Instances and Destionations are created and are working for this second app

entry.title: API call returns Not Found Error in SaaS Approuter (SAP Build Workzone)
entry.content:
Hello All,

I am trying to develop a HTML5 application with a managed approuter. The HTML5 application works fine as such, but when I integrate it with SAP Build Workzone, standard edition, the working APIs return 404 error.


Above is when the request is made from the HTML5 application

This is when the request is made from SAP Build Workzone, standard edition


Can anyone please tell me how to resolve this? Do let me know if any further details are required.

Thanks

Mithran

entry.title: can we add inline javascript in sap html in maintain email template
entry.content:
Hello experts,

Is it possible to add javascript in sap maintain email template app

I want to create table in html where it should change dynamically.

Here I have attached the image of the code.

entry.title: SAPUI5 : Loading files from different UI5 repository not working
entry.content:
I have a UI5 application which will use views and controllers, from another UI5 repo. To achieve this I have created 2 apps ( UI5 repo ) as

  • commonui ( This is not an actual app, but it is just a provider, which have reusable views & controllers
  • mainappui - This has its own views and controllers, and uses the BaseController.js from the commonui, and other views too

The code looks like below

index.html of commonui

sap.ui.define(
    ["sap/ui/core/mvc/Controller", "sap/ui/core/routing/History", "sap/ui/core/UIComponent"],
    function (Controller, History, UIComponent) {
        "use strict";

        return Controller.extend("com.testapp.commonui.controller.BaseController", {
            formatter: formatter,
            getModel: function (sName) {
                return this.getView().getModel(sName);
            },
})

xs-app.json of commonui

  "welcomeFile": "/index.html",
  "authenticationMethod": "route",
  "logout": {
    "logoutEndpoint": "/do/logout"
  },
  "routes": [
    {
      "source": "^(.*)$",
      "target": "$1",
      "service": "html5-apps-repo-rt",
      "authenticationType": "xsuaa"
    }
  ]
}
index.html of mainappui 
//
..... Showing only the resourceroots
data-sap-ui-resourceroots='{
            "com.testapp.mainappui": "./",
            "com.testapp.commonui.": "./../comtestappcommonui./"<br>        }'
//......

mta.yaml 

ID: lastmile
_schema-version: 3.2.0
version: 0.0.1
parameters:
  enable-parallel-deployments: true
modules:
  - name: webapp_deployer
    type: com.sap.application.content
    path: deployer
    requires:
      - name: main_html5_repo_host
        parameters:
          content-target: true
    build-parameters:
      build-result: resources
      requires:
        - name: commonui
          artifacts:
            - dist/commonui.zip
          target-path: resources/
        - name: mainappui
          artifacts:
            - dist/mainappui.zip
          target-path: resources/

  - name: commonui
    type: html5
    path: commonui
    build-parameters:
      builder: custom
      commands:
        - npm run build:commonui --prefix ..
      supported-platforms: []

  - name: mainappui
    type: html5
    path: mainappui
    build-parameters:
      builder: custom
      commands:
        - npm run build:mainappui --prefix ..<br>      supported-platforms: []


resources:
  - name: main_html5_repo_host
    type: org.cloudfoundry.managed-service
    parameters:
      service-plan: app-host
      service: html5-apps-repo

When I launch the app, the mainappui is fetching the BaseController.js from different URL/Domain

Please let me know what is wrong here

entry.title: Getting 500 error after migrating destinations with SAML from Neo to Cloud Foundry
entry.content:
Hello,

Recently, we have migrated one HTML5 app from Neo to Cloud Foundry.
This app has a couple of destinations configured on Neo - (it is using a few backend services).

Those destinations have OAuth2SAMLBearerAssertion as Authentication Type.

We created those destinations from scratch on Cloud Foundry, and when we set the Auth Type to OAuth2SAMLBearerAssertion, we are getting the 500 - Internal Server Error when we try to run the app through the Launchpad (when trying to get the metadata).

But when we set the Auth type to just Basic Authentication, the app is working fine and it's able to retrieve the data from the backend.

Does anyone know what can be the issue? Do we maybe need to configure something on Cloud Foundry, so that our destinations can be accessible with SAML auth?

entry.title: Application not found in local html5-apps-repo and there is no binding to remote html5-apps-repo
entry.content:
I'm trying to create a new application from an existing one and both uses the same service. After building and running it at port 6004, its giving Internal Server Error.

From the log I can see

Application 'TestApp' not found in local html5-apps-repo and there is no binding to remote html5-apps-repo

entry.title: Copy data from object page and insert into multicombo input of dialog/wizard
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I need to copy data from the object page by clicking the copy button and put those values in the wizard into the respective fields(multi-combo input fields) that appear by pressing the copy button on the object page.

Note; The FIORI app was created through CDS and CRUD operation through BOPF, The Copy button on the object page is the extension of the FIORI app.

Regards,
Subhanshu

entry.title: React app development in Business Application Studio , testing with destination
entry.content:
Hi ,

BAS provides HTML5 template to develop react applications. It also lists the destinations to developers as a data source for the app to consume. I see xs-app.json generated , which essentially helps after deploying the application to HTML5 repository / standalone app router

Question : I would love to test my application connecting to the destination , just like how we do with UI5 apps using ui5.yaml .

Sreehari

entry.title: html email body alignment
entry.content:
Hi,

I am changing a program to send an email in html format. Initially program used to send email in RAW format.

In RAW format email body contains dynamic data with header as shown below.

Item(position 3) Description(position 33) comments(position 71).

But the problem is when I change the document_type = 'HTM' the spaces are compromised.

Can some one suggest me on how to keep those space between the headers and items intact for html emailing.


thanks.

entry.title: SAP Custom Domain Service and how to map route HTML5 App to a custom domain
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

We have developed an HTML5 app on SAP BTP that is visible in SAP BTP subaccount under HTML5 repository. The App is "Managed Application Router provided by SAP Build Work Zone, standard edition". We can see the app in CF terminal with the command CF html5-list.

We also have subscribed to SAP Custom domain service to shorten the URL for the app to something more elegant (and shortened).

We have completed the steps until the DNS configuration but cannot complete the 'Map your app to custom domain' step as unable to see the HTML app in the CF runtime.

I have following questions -

  1. There is no documentation OR SAP HANA Academy tutorials that talk about a scenario to configure custom domain for the HTML5 app. Any thoughts where can I find it?
  2. Can the HTML5 repository apps can be accessed in the CF runtime space for the given subaccount?!
  3. If answer is yes to question 2, how to map-route the app to custom domain using command like cf map-route....?!!
  4. Can the HTML5 apps be mapped to custom domain only in "Production account/environment"?

Any insights into this is helpful. Thanks!

entry.title: Application not visible in HTML5 Section in cockpit after deployment done in BAS !
entry.content:
Hello SAP Experts !

1. We have develop MTA project using Business application studio with backend service and it works fine locally.

2. We have compare it's file with other project's file, and we noticed that xs-security.json file not generated in our case.

3. Also, in mta.yaml there is uaa code is missing, because of these two reasons after deploy the project using Business application studio we are not able to see this deploy app in HTML5 Section in cockpit also in Instance section we are able to see only two configuration of this deploy app that is, html5-srv and destination-service 3rd configuration is missing that is Authorization because of this we are not able to see app in HTML5 Section.

any solution from your side ?

Thank you in advance

entry.title: 503 Service Temporarily Unavailable : HTML5 +CAP + Cloud Foundry
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We are trying to deploy one simple app on Cloud Foundry and getting the below error.

"503 Service Temporarily Unavailable"

I am using MTA to deploy the app but after deployment, we are getting this error. Below is the code repository.

Any suggestion is highly appreciated.

Link : ..

Best regards,

Chandan

entry.title: Offer Letter Template Edits
entry.content:
Is there a way users can edit the offer letter template in html format without the need to manual code each line or use a public free html edit tool? For privacy reasons we prefer not to have our offer letters exposed on a public site simply to edit a template we would update on a regular basis.

Thanks

entry.title: HTML5 Application 403 Forbidden error while calling Cloud Connector
entry.content:
Hello, I have created an UI5 Fiori Application using BAS in BTP. When i do a prereview of the application i am getting the results correctly. The application is picking up Location Hierarchy and putting it in a tree structure. The location hierarchy is read from the On-Premises S4Hana system using Cloud connector and Destination defined in the BTP.  In the BAS when i run the CURL command and provide the URL. I am able to get the metadata.

Here is the preview of my application 

Now i deployed this application to BTP Cloud Foundry as an HTML5 Application and it was deployed successfully without any error from BAS

Now, when i try to run the application from HTML5 Application Tab/ Repository. I am not able to get the Location tree loaded. 

When i debug the calls in Google Chrome developer mode. I noticed there is an 403 Error.

In the Preview tab i see 

I spoke to my Network and BASIS Admin. They do not have the UCON enabled in the On-Premises system.

I am totally lost and would appreciate if anyone can help me resolve the issue. 

Here is how my xs-app.json file looks like

here is xs-security.json file looks like

Thanks for all your help and time in helping me resolve this issue.

entry.title: Logs of HTML5 Applications Managed by SAP Cloud Platform (Work Zone)
entry.content:
Dear colleagues,

we developed HTML5 Applications Managed by SAP Cloud Platform (Work Zone/Launchpad)

and need the logs of the applications.

Is there a way to get the application logs?

Best regards,

Andreas

entry.title: Different behaviour Business Application Studio vs SAP BTP HTML5-Application with Fragments
entry.content:
Hi all, 

I'm a Javascript-Noob but need some of it for my Fiori Elements Enhancements. 

I built an App where I want to have a Custom Action. Within this action I'm calling an API to fetch values and then calling a fragment I built with XML. Inside the Fragment the values fetched will be visible in a dropdown. On Business Application Studio everything is working. My Fragmentis opening without problems and my data is presented there. 

Then I deployed the App to our BTP as an HTML5-Application (via MTA). The App is opening and everything works beside the Fragment. My coding looks like this (instead of debugger I'm doing some things, but in the end I'm opening the Fragment via the open()-Method.

 

var QueryTaskCodes = jQuery.ajax
    ({
        type: "GET",
        contentType: "application/json",
        url: URLTaskCodes,
        dataType: "json",
        success: function (data) {
            if (!that.pDialogCloseCreateNotification) {
                that.loadFragment({
                    id: "CreateAndClose",
                    name: "some.app.ext.fragment.CreateAndClose",
                    type: "XML",
                    controller: that //this
                    }).then((oDialog) => {
                        debugger;
                        that.pDialogCloseCreateNotification = oDialog;
                        that.pDialogCloseCreateNotification.open();
                        });
    }}})

 

 Within the Busines Application Studio Preview the debugger shows, that oDialog is set.

However, on BTP HTML5-App it's undefined. 

What am I missing? What am I doing wrong?

Best wishes,

Julian
